title: BLOCK 6 FINAL: Practical mastery
description: Block 6 final — 90 WPM on a long real-world business paragraph
text: After eighteen months of careful planning and four straight quarters of double-digit growth, the leadership team announced a new chapter for the company: a global expansion into seven new markets, a fresh product line aimed at enterprise customers, and a strategic partnership with one of the largest technology vendors in the world.

tips.text: Block 6 closes here, on a long stretch of real business prose at 90 words a minute. No tricks left, just the work you have already put in.
Clear this and you sit among the fastest few who ever touch a keyboard. You did not get here by luck; you got here by showing up.

tips.target: After eighteen months of careful planning and four straight quarters of double-digit growth, the leadership team announced a new chapter for the company: a global expansion

tips.text: The last block, 91 through 99, takes this same speed and polishes it past 100. The hard climbing is behind you; what is left is refinement.

tips.target: into seven new markets, a fresh product line aimed at enterprise customers, and a strategic partnership with one of the largest technology vendors in the world.

character_tips.anna: Block 6, done. Ninety words a minute is an elite professional's hand. You have earned the description.
character_tips.maxim: Practical mastery is cleared. What follows is pure refinement toward 100 and beyond.
character_tips.knopych: The big stretch is behind you. Stand up, take a breath, then go finish the climb.
character_tips.klavochka: Nine lessons stand between you and true mastery. You are more than ready for them. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
